command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time
cmd = ['bun','test','scripts/verify-m064-s03.test.ts']
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, text=True, capture_output=True)
duration = int((time.time() - start) * 1000)
print(proc.stdout, end='')
if proc.stderr:
    print(proc.stderr, end='')
print(f'__EXIT_CODE__={proc.returncode}')
print(f'__DURATION_MS__={duration}')
PY
